data.title: Goldman Sachs Increases Stake in Dropsuite Limited
data.description:
The latest update is out from Dropsuite ( (AU:DSE) ).

Goldman Sachs Group has increased its voting power in Dropsuite Limited from 5.0105% to 6.4303%, reflecting a significant change in its interests. This move indicates a strategic investment by Goldman Sachs, potentially impacting Dropsuite’s market positioning and signaling confidence in the company’s growth prospects.

More about Dropsuite

Dropsuite Limited operates in the technology industry, focusing on providing cloud-based backup solutions. The company offers services that help businesses protect their digital assets and ensure data security, catering primarily to small and medium-sized enterprises.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $255M

data.title: Addiko Bank AG Announces Change in Shareholder Structure
data.description:
Addiko Bank AG ( (ADBKF) ) just unveiled an update.

Addiko Bank AG announced a change in its shareholder structure following the death of Mr. Miodrag Kostic, who was the controlling person of Agri Holding AG, which controlled Agri Europe Cyprus Limited. As of March 10, 2025, Agri Holding no longer controls Agri Europe Cyprus Limited, resulting in a notification obligation due to the change in voting rights. This shift may impact the bank’s governance and stakeholder relations as the new structure takes effect.

More about Addiko Bank AG

Addiko Bank AG is a financial institution based in Vienna, Austria. It operates primarily in the banking sector, offering a range of financial services and products. The bank is listed on the Vienna Stock Exchange and is known for its focus on providing straightforward and efficient banking solutions.

YTD Price Performance: 8.12%

Average Trading Volume: 1,077

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $423.6M

data.title: Altamin Limited Announces Director’s Interest Change
data.description:
Altamin Limited ( (AU:AZI) ) has shared an announcement.

Altamin Limited announced a change in the director’s interest notice involving Alexander S Burns. The change involved a transfer of shares from ASIM Holdings Pty Ltd and a consolidation of superfund holdings into The RB SMSF Pty Ltd, with no change in the total number of shares or percentage holdings. This internal restructuring of shares does not impact the overall shareholding structure, maintaining stability in the company’s ownership.

More about Altamin Limited

data.title: Cettire Ltd. Sees Shift in Substantial Holder’s Voting Power
data.description:
Cettire Ltd. ( (AU:CTT) ) has issued an update.

Cettire Ltd. has experienced a change in the interests of a substantial holder, Bank of America Corporation, which has reduced its voting power from 7.90% to 6.76%. data.title: Tongguan Gold Group Ltd. Reports Significant Profit Growth in 2024
data.description:
An update from Tongguan Gold Group Ltd. ( (HK:0340) ) is now available.

Tongguan Gold Group Ltd. has announced a significant increase in its financial performance for the year ending December 31, 2024, with a 7% rise in revenue to approximately HK$1,605 million and a 250% increase in net profit to approximately HK$210 million compared to the previous year. This growth is attributed to higher average selling prices and increased sales volume of mine-produced gold, particularly from the acquisition of Grand Gallant Investments Limited. However, the company faced challenges in Tongguan County due to the suspension of operations for new construction, affecting sales volume.

More about Tongguan Gold Group Ltd.

Tongguan Gold Group Ltd. operates in the mining industry, focusing primarily on the production and sale of gold. The company has operations in Subei County and Tongguan County, with a market focus on increasing its gold production and sales.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €365.5M

data.title: Hua Hong Semiconductor Schedules Board Meeting for Key Financial Decisions
data.description:
Hua Hong Semiconductor Ltd. ( (HK:1347) ) has issued an announcement.

Hua Hong Semiconductor Ltd. has announced a board meeting scheduled for March 27, 2025, to discuss several key items, including the approval of the company’s audited consolidated results for the year ending December 31, 2024, potential dividend payments, and the planning of the annual general meeting. This meeting is significant for stakeholders as it will address the company’s financial performance and strategic decisions impacting its market positioning.

More about Hua Hong Semiconductor Ltd.

Hua Hong Semiconductor Ltd. is a company incorporated in Hong Kong, operating in the semiconductor industry. The company focuses on the production and development of semiconductor products and services, serving various market needs.
